candidates.name: PR Review Complexity Forecaster

candidates.pain: Developers waste time on unexpectedly complex PRs because they can't gauge review difficulty before diving in.

candidates.pain: Sales teams use static lead scores that don't reflect actual conversion patterns in their specific market.
